arts.ttl: Anthony Gordon left red-faced after making Liverpool transfer promise to team-mates
arts.sum: Liverpool tried and failed with a bid to sign Anthony Gordon during the summer transfer window and the winger is now close to committing his future to Newcastle

arts.ttl: Referee returns to officiate Liverpool match after Luis Diaz VAR controversy
arts.sum: Darren England has been appointed to a Liverpool game for the first time since his involvement in the infamous Luis Diaz goal at Tottenham.

arts.ttl: Jerzy Dudek tells Liverpool academy graduate he's a 'top' talent, he impressed in the League Cup last night

arts.ttl: West Ham boss Julen Lopetegui forced to use crutches after incident in Liverpool thrashing
arts.sum: Julen Lopetegui was hobbling gingerly around West Ham’s Rush Green training ground on Thursday and looks likely to still be using crutches when they travel to Brentford this Saturday

arts.ttl: Arne Slot hands Liverpool defender clear pathway after ruthless 'kick up the backside'
arts.sum: Jarell Quansah issued a strong response after an early setback in Liverpool's 5-1 Carabao Cup win against West Ham United on Wednesday night

arts.ttl: Arne Slot is repeating Jurgen Klopp trait that Liverpool supporters and players love
arts.sum: Rotation has been a factor for Arne Slot in the last two Liverpool games and that is likely to see the Dutchman popular with players - just like his iconic predecessor was.

arts.ttl: Liverpool's Anthony Gordon pursuit takes twist as 'lucrative deal' close to being agreed
arts.sum: Liverpool were close to signing Anthony Gordon from Newcastle in the summer before talks over a deal collapsed - and the England star is now poised to commit his future to the Magpies

arts.ttl: Liverpool ace could have big bearing on Man United’s chances of keeping hold of 25-year-old star
arts.sum: Manchester United could have a potential battle on their hands to keep hold of Diogo Dalot if Trent Alexander-Arnold signs a new contract with Liverpool. Dalot has been at United since 2018 with Jose Mourinho responsible for signing the Portugal international, who has made 165 appearances to date for the Red Devils.
